home.heroTitle: Celebrate Culture. Build Community. Shape the Future.
home.heroSubtitle: A living digital home for Bengali families in Illawarra with events, membership, resources, and collective giving.
home.highlight1Body: Seasonal festivals, kids programs, and cultural nights managed end-to-end.
home.highlight2Body: Simple onboarding for families, students, and individual members with role-aware access.
home.highlight3Body: Transparent, secure contribution workflows with ledger-ready tracking.
